title: May Pen Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting May Pen with a Z-Score of +3.83. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in May Pen has resulted in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.4 GG, significantly higher than normal.
 The relative humidity is at 58%, and wind speed is 19.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat.
 These conditions will persist, posing significant risks to the population and infrastructure.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in May Pen immediately.
